payload.blocked_reason: T01 deliverable POST_PASS_INVARIANTS_BY_TYPE absent — close must not declare roadmap_goal met. T01 squash commit 514beee modifies only .specfuse/features/FEAT-2026-0017-wiring-race-guard/WU-01-post-pass-invariant-guard.md (frontmatter status+cost+produces_driver_helper fields). No edits to .specfuse/scripts/loop.py. No new tests/test_loop_post_pass_invariant.py file. Symbols POST_PASS_INVARIANTS_BY_TYPE, assert_terminal_flips_fired, verify_post_pass_invariants all return 0 grep hits in loop.py. T02 deliverables verified present (produces_driver_helper field on WorkUnit at loop.py:152, detect_driver_wiring at lint_plan.py:93). Per escalation trigger 1 of WU-90 + authoring-work-units §9 existence-check discipline: do NOT set verdict: met; do NOT write RETROSPECTIVE.md claiming roadmap_goal met. Remediation: dispatch T01 (or a T01H hygiene WU) to actually land POST_PASS_INVARIANTS_BY_TYPE + assert_terminal_flips_fired + verify_post_pass_invariants + tests, then re-run close.

Pre-existing environmental verify-gate failure: 20 tempdir-git errors in tests/test_loop_files_changed_guard.py + tests/test_loop_orchestration.py whose _init_git helpers lack `git config commit.gpgSign false` after `git init`. Operator's global `commit.gpgsign=true` + SSH commit signing fails inside subprocesses that cannot reach ssh-agent. Same 20 errors reproduce on main. Fix is out of WU scope: Do not touch limits changes to exactly 2 files (.specfuse/scripts/loop.py + new test file). Recommended unblocks: (1) author a hygiene WU (T01H) that adds the gpgSign-false config call to the two unsanitized _init_git helpers; OR (2) export `GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null` in the driver's verify env; OR (3) toggle the operator's global commit.gpgsign off for driver runs. Separately, AC4 wiring has a documented structural deviation (Escalation trigger 4): the spec asks for retry-within-budget on guard failure, but fire_terminal_flips runs outside the per-WU attempt loop in current run(); wired at the closest viable site with fatal-exit semantics — request operator review of whether that ordering is acceptable or whether run() should restructure to move fire_terminal_flips into the per-WU passed branch.
